channel.title: theBalancedBriefNLmoneyAndMarkets
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from theBalancedBriefNLmoneyAndMarkets, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Apple sees $200 billion market-cap wipeout as stock slides on AI fears
item.description: Apple reportedly is facing even more snags in its planned rollout of a more advanced version of Siri, which has been long delayed.

item.title: More ‘see-through’ issues surface for Lululemon, and the stock is taking a hit
item.description: The athleisure company’s stock falls after more “see-through” complaints surfaced about a new leggings line.

item.title: Coinbase swings to surprise loss amid flight from crypto, but talks up prediction markets
item.description: The crypto exchange’s stock bounced off a two-year low as it looked to ease investor worries amid a sharp crypto selloff.

item.title: Why Cisco’s stock is falling hard — and taking the tech sector with it
item.description: Arista’s stock is dropping ahead of earnings, after Cisco’s report sparked renewed fears about the impact of high memory prices.

item.title: This trucking company is AI’s latest casualty, as its stock suffers worst day in more than 6 years
item.description: Shares of C.H. Robinson Worldwide on Thursday headed for their steepest drop ever, as investors seemed to focus their fears about AI disruption onto t...

item.title: The Evolving Landscape of Securities Litigation and Financial Disputes
item.description: Securities litigation is undergoing a quiet but consequential transformation. The rise of artificial intelligence and a shifting regulatory environmen...

item.title: The Importance of Virtual Data Rooms in Mergers & Acquisitions
item.description: A virtual data room (VDR) (sometimes called an online data room) is a secure online repository for a company’s most important and confidential agreeme...

item.title: Compensation for AI Employees Is Skyrocketing
item.description: Over the past decade, compensation for artificial intelligence (AI) professionals has surged at an unprecedented pace, reshaping the talent market and...

item.title: Hiring Travel Nurses: How Small Healthcare Providers Can Attract Top Talent
item.description: Post sponsored by Trustaff A persistent and critical nursing shortage has affected facilities nationwide. Smaller and rural facilities experience this...

item.title: Starting a Mobile IV Therapy Business: Lessons From Top Providers Across the USA
item.description: Post sponsored by Mobile IV Nurses In This Article How to Start an IV Drip Business Lessons Gleaned From a Top-Rated Mobile IV Therapy Service Provide...

item.title: Financial Services Roundup: Market Talk
item.description: Gain insight on Experian, SoFi Technologies and more in the latest Market Talks covering Financial Services.

item.title: Comex Gold, Silver Settle Lower
item.description: Gold settled 1.4% lower, down two of the past three sessions, and silver fell 2.5%, down three of the past four sessions.

item.title: Arabica Coffee Prices Hit Record on U.S., Colombia Tariff Spat
item.description: Arabica coffee prices hit a record level, as traders digested the withdrawal of President Trump’s threats to impose tariffs and economic sanctions on ...

item.title: Stocks Sink in Broad AI Rout Sparked by China's DeepSeek
item.description: U.S. stocks were mostly lower, with the Nasdaq leading declines as makers of AI infrastructure suffered steep falls, many in the double digits. Nvidia...

item.title: DeepSeek Won't Sink U.S. AI Titans
item.description: Panic fueling the selloff of Nvidia, Broadcom and other tech giants is overblown.
